About Me

I am a DevOps Engineer with experience in cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, containerization, and infrastructure automation. I enjoy building scalable systems using AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, and Terraform.

Projects

AI Bank Application DevSecOps Pipeline

Implemented a CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions, Docker, and Kubernetes to automate build, security scanning, and deployment.

Three Tier Architecture Deployment

Deployed a scalable three-tier architecture using AWS, Terraform, and containerized services.
